MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-27-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BAYVIEW OPERA HOUSE, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF RONALD MACK SR.'S COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. CCP 435.5 REQUIRES A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A MOTION TO STRIKE MAY BE FILED. COUNSEL'S DECLARATION DEMONSTRATES THAT A COMPLIANT MEET-AND-CONFER HAS NOT OCCURRED, SO THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH CCP 435.5. DEFENDANT HAS UNTIL JULY 27, 2019 TO RESPOND TO THE CROSS COMPLAINT AFTER THE MEET AND CONFER EFFORTS. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2019 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BAYVIEW OPERA HOUSE, INC.'s DEMURRER TO Plaintiff Ronald Mack Sr.'s COMPLAINT

CCP 430.41 requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer may be filed. Counsel's declaration demonstrates that a compliant meet-and-confer has not occurred, so the demurrer is ordered OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with 430.41. Defendant has until July 27, 2019 to respond to the cross complaint after the meet and confer efforts.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff Ronald Mack Sr.S Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BAYVIEW OPERA HOUSE, INC.'s Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff Ronald Mack Sr.'s Complaint

CCP 435.5 requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a motion to strike may be filed. Counsel's declaration demonstrates that a compliant meet-and-confer has not occurred, so the motion to strike is ordered OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with CCP 435.5. Defendant has until July 27, 2019 to respond to the cross complaint after the meet and confer efforts.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
